title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
description: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.

title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
description: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.

title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
description: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.

title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
description: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.

title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
description: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.

title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
description: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.

title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
description: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.

title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
description: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
description: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.

title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
description: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.

title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
description: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.

title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
description: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
description: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.

title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
description: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.

title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
description: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."

title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile LA mayoral race
description: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
description: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.

title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
description: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.

title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
description: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.

title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
description: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
